visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with short black hair and blunt bangs is seen in a profile view, looking out a window. She is wearing a white, translucent bridal veil over her head and a white lacy lingerie-style top that resembles a wedding gown bodice. The lighting is soft and natural, coming from the window on the right. She has a thoughtful, slightly dreamy expression with her mouth slightly open. (2) The woman turns her head slightly towards the camera and breaks into a wide smile, showing her teeth. Her eyes crinkle slightly in a joyful expression. The translucent veil remains draped over her face and shoulders, catching the light. The background shows a dimly lit indoor space with white curtains near the window. (3) A closer shot focuses on her face as she continues to smile and look around happily. She tilts her head and looks down momentarily, still smiling broadly. The lacy details of her top and a thin silver necklace with a small pendant are visible. The atmosphere remains romantic and soft-focused throughout the sequence.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: POV : 當我每次看到帥哥時 What I think every time I see a handsome guy.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A romantic pop ballad begins with a clear male vocal singing in English. The accompaniment consists of a soft, melodic piano track with subtle reverb, creating an intimate studio atmosphere. The tempo is slow and steady, with no audible environmental noise or interference. (2) The male singer continues with a smooth, emotive delivery, reaching a higher melodic register. The piano continues to provide a gentle rhythmic bed. No sound effects or sudden transitions are present, maintaining a linear musical flow. (3) The ballad proceeds towards its conclusion with the same instrumentation and vocal style. The recording quality is high, exhibiting a studio-clean signal-to-noise ratio. The song maintains its sentimental and warm mood until the very end of the clip.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a humorous 'POV' trend content where the creator jokes about wanting to get married immediately whenever she sees a handsome man. The bridal veil and dress serve as a visual punchline to the text overlay.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies on the visual metaphor of bridal wear to express a common relatable joke about romantic infatuation.
